ai.error: OPENAI_API_KEY or LLM_MODEL is not configured

{"author": null, "closed_at": null, "collaborating_teams": null, "collaborating_users": null, "created_at": null, "credits": [{"login": "vidh0411", "type": "reporter"}], "credits_detailed": [{"state": "accepted", "type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/243469214?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vidh0411/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vidh0411/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vidh0411/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vidh0411/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/vidh0411", "id": 243469214, "login": "vidh0411", "node_id": "U_kgDODoMLng", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vidh0411/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vidh0411/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vidh0411/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vidh0411/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vidh0411/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/vidh0411", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45155", "cvss": {"score": 2.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 2.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}}, "cwe_ids": ["CWE-639"], "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-639", "name": "Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key"}], "description": "### Impact

A missing access check on API level allowed to add unknown circles by their ID directly to other circles. Since circle IDs have 62^15 complexity by default this is still unlikely to be executable at will, but if access to an ID was available via another source, memberships could be tracked like this.

### Patches

It is recommended that the Nextcloud Server is upgraded to 32.0.7 or 33.0.1
It is recommended that the Nextcloud Enterprise Server is upgraded to 29.0.16.14, 30.0.17.8, 31.0.14.3, 32.0.7 or 33.0.1

### Workarounds

* Disable app circles

### References

* [HackerOne](https://hackerone.com/reports/3511998)
* [PullRequest](https://github.com/nextcloud/circles/pull/2401)

### For more information

If you have any questions or comments about this advisory:

* Create a post in [nextcloud/security-advisories](https://github.com/nextcloud/security-advisories/discussions)
* Customers: Open a support ticket at [portal.nextcloud.com](https://portal.nextcloud.com)", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-xpgv-grf9-gm7x", "html_url": title: Private circle can be added to another circle via API
